user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Arc'teryx
Product type: Alpha SV hardshell jacket
Tone: rugged, performance-driven, premium
Visual style: Clean, minimalist imagery highlighting technical details and extreme outdoor environments.
Conceptual technique: authentic adventure storytelling
Format: image

brief.objective: Showcase the Alpha SV jacket as the ultimate high-performance outerwear for extreme conditions, emphasizing its rugged durability and premium quality.
brief.target_audience: Outdoor enthusiasts, mountaineers, and adventure seekers who demand reliable and technical gear.
brief.key_message: Engineered for the fiercest elements. The Alpha SV delivers unmatched protection and durability when it matters most.

visual_direction.imagery: A lone climber wearing the Alpha SV jacket navigating a stark, extreme alpine environment with snow, rock, and wind-blown textures. Close-up shots highlight technical features such as sealed seams, reinforced shoulders, and adjustable hoods.
visual_direction.color_palette: Muted earth tones with pops of the jacket’s signature color to draw attention.
visual_direction.composition: Wide shots that convey scale and isolation, combined with tight detail shots of the jacket’s construction.

copy.headline: Alpha SV: Built for the Savage
copy.body: When the elements turn ruthless, trust the Alpha SV hardshell to keep you moving forward. Designed with cutting-edge materials and meticulous craftsmanship, this jacket stands up to the harshest conditions so you can conquer your next adventure.
copy.call_to_action: Explore the Alpha SV at arcteryx.com

brief.conceptual_technique: Authentic adventure storytelling through real environment immersion and technical focus.
